papers.name: Physics Paper 1
papers.coverage_notes: Assesses content that is not bold and does not have a 'P' reference (core content shared with International GCSE Science).

papers.name: Physics Paper 2
papers.coverage_notes: Assesses all content including bold and 'P' reference material (Physics-only content not in Double Award).

assessment_objectives.name: Knowledge and understanding of physics
assessment_objectives.description: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of scientific ideas, techniques and procedures.

assessment_objectives.name: Application of knowledge and understanding, analysis and evaluation of physics
assessment_objectives.description: Apply knowledge and understanding of scientific ideas, techniques and procedures.

assessment_objectives.name: Experimental skills, analysis and evaluation of data and methods in physics
assessment_objectives.description: Analyse information and ideas to interpret and evaluate, make judgements and draw conclusions.

difficulty_ladder.description: single concept recall or direct formula substitution (e.g., state a law, calculate current from charge and time)
multi-step application within one topic (e.g., combine Ohm's law with series/parallel rules, interpret a motion graph)
cross-topic reasoning or exam-style synthesis (e.g., energy transfer in a motor circuit with efficiency and power calculations)

lesson_use.notes: v1 skill supports classification and qbank routing only. Teacher/student/parent modes are not enabled.

exclude_from_questions: Double Award Science content not in 4PH1
concepts explicitly marked out_of_scope in topics.json

marking_guidance.notes: Command words are defined in the specification p.47-48. Use generated marking guidance only; do not copy official mark schemes.
